title: Assistant Store Manager - Future Retail - Work From Home Available

jsonLd.title: Assistant Store Manager - Future Retail - Work From Home Available
jsonLd.description:
Future Retail invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Assistant Store Manager at our Vadodara location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Future Retail:
Future Retail is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Inventory Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Referral bonus program
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Learning & development budget
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Vadodara, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Future Retail!
